# Vest.js 5.x source map

This file is the internal source map for the current **Vest 5.4 / 5.x** lane.

Use it when the router or a sub-skill needs to ground an answer in the correct upstream docs.

## Core docs

- Getting started: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/get_started`
- Concepts: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/concepts`
- API reference: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/api_reference`
- TypeScript support: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/typescript_support`

## Suite control flow

- Skip and only: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/writing_your_suite/including_and_excluding/skip_and_only`
- skipWhen: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/writing_your_suite/including_and_excluding/skipWhen`
- omitWhen: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/writing_your_suite/including_and_excluding/omitWhen`
- include: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/writing_your_suite/including_and_excluding/include`
- optional fields: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/writing_your_suite/optional_fields`

## Results and execution

- Accessing the result: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/writing_your_suite/accessing_the_result`
- Execution modes: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/writing_your_suite/execution_modes`

## Async, warnings, and advanced test structure

- Async tests: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/writing_tests/async_tests`
- Warn-only tests: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/writing_tests/warn_only_tests`
- Dynamic tests with `each`: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/writing_tests/advanced_test_features/dynamic_tests`
- Grouping tests: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/writing_tests/advanced_test_features/grouping_tests`

## Enforce and reusable rule design

- Composing enforce rules: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/enforce/composing_enforce_rules`
- Creating custom rules: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/enforce/creating_custom_rules`

## Server-side validation

- Server-side validations: `https://vestjs.dev/docs/5.x/server_side_validations`

## Notes

- Vest 5.x docs are legacy docs now that 6.x exists, so always keep the `/5.x/` path in version-specific answers.
- Do not silently substitute latest-version links when the skill is answering in the 5.x lane.
